description_long: This is a vintage-style freestanding bathtub with a deep, rectangular basin and a wide, flat rim. The interior is smooth and light gray, showing signs of wear and some discoloration, particularly around the drain area. The exterior is darker, with a weathered, mottled finish that suggests age and exposure, possibly cast iron with enamel coating. The bathtub stands on four ornate, clawfoot-style legs, which are metallic and slightly rusted, adding to its antique appearance. There are no visible plumbing fixtures such as faucets or handles attached to the tub itself. The overall look is utilitarian yet classic, suitable for urban environments where reclaimed or industrial aesthetics are valued.
description: A vintage, freestanding clawfoot bathtub with a weathered dark exterior and smooth, light gray interior, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide rim, deep basin, and two of the clawfoot legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the tub, the weathered exterior, and all four clawfoot legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the drain area with visible discoloration and the symmetrical shape of the tub.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the length and exterior wear, with all four legs visible.
